title: US-Iran Peace Deal 2026: Full 14-Point Agreement Explained | The Breakdown
description: Trump signed a 14-point peace deal with Iran at the G7. Strait of Hormuz reopens, sanctions waived, $300B reconstruction fund. A complete breakdown of what's in the deal and what comes next.
